data: {"generalSituation":"An anticyclone aloft will bring very hot weather to the coast of Guangdong persistently in the next couple of days. A trough of low pressure is expected to edge closer to the coast of southern China towards the weekend. The weather will become unsettled with showers and squally thunderstorms over the region. An easterly airstream will affect the coast of Guangdong over the weekend. High temperature weather will be alleviated slightly. Besides, the area of low pressure near Yap will develop into a tropical cyclone. It will move across the western North Pacific to the east of the Philippines in the next few days and intensify gradually. It will move in the general direction of the seas east of Taiwan to the vicinity of the Ryukyu Islands.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260527","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 3 to 4, occasionally force 5 on high ground at first.","forecastWeather":"Cloudy periods at first.
